授業目的: The course aims at strengthening your confidence in using English for communication. By the end of this term, you should have improved your skills in written and oral communication in English.
到達目標: 1) The student can compose and communicate a clearly formulated and persuasive message orally and in writing. 2) The student masters the paragraph format and can present, analyze, and discuss information in an academically acceptable format. 3) In oral presentations the participant can convey her/his messages to others.
授業方法: 注　学院の方針に従って授業は教室で行うが、認められるニーズあれば、平行同時双方向型オンライン授業で実施予定だ。

第1回:
【Startup Week】 URL:https://～・・・"Online class（On-demand format）"／ 《30minutes》
 Introduction to the autumn schedule and assignment of the first task.
第2回:
【Core Week①】 "Face-to-face class"《90minutes》
Textbook based
【Flex Hours】《240minutes》Read 30000 words using the MReader program. Instruction will be given in class.
第3回: Prepare a 15-minute pair discussion of a Sustainable Development Goal you will be assigned in class.
第4回: Plan to work on your SDG discussion with your partner.
第5回: Plan to work on your SDG discussion with your partner.
第6回:
【Core Week⑤】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
SDGs in Japan and a developing country - a pair dialogue.
In this and the following classes, 4  groups will give a fifteen-minute dialogue each folowed by 5 minutes for the audience to write a short review. The dialogues will be recorded on video. The speakers will get a copy of their performance and must submit a reflection on it in writing together with a copy of their manuscript. The audiences' comments will be graded, too.
第7回:
【Core Week⑥】 "Face-to-face class"《90minutes》
SDGs in Japan and a developing country - a pair dialogue.
第8回:
【Core Week⑦】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
SDGs in Japan and a developing country - a pair dialogue.
第9回:
【Core Week⑧】 "Face-to-face class"《90minutes》
SDGs in Japan and a developing country - a pair dialogue.
第10回:
【Core Week➈】"Face-to-face class" 《90minutes》
(SDGs in Japan and a developing country - a pair dialogue, if any are left). Textbook based

トピック.授業外学習2: Expect about 2 hours of homework per week.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic:
各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。
DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。
各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。

Feedback is normally given on LUNA as soon as possible after submission of an assignment.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading2: 授業外学修課題／Assignment, homework required outside class (06)
MReader = 20 points. 2 reports @ 10 points.  Content quality counts 60 percent, language accuracy and other formal qualities 40 percent.
成績評価Grading3: プレゼンテーション・発表／Presentation (07)
One oral presentation and feedback-reflections. 20 point
成績評価Grading4: 授業への参加度（自発性、積極性、主体性、等）／In-class participation,contribution (09)
Peer-reviews, active participation including preparedness to answer questions.
成績評価Grading5: 備考　Note Individual reports: Throughout the course, you will get assignments - written and oral reports. All of them count toward the final grade. Content quality accounts for 60 percent, while language accuracy and other formal qualities comprise 40 percent. NB: COPY-PASTE IS ILLEGAL. Using AI-assistance is tempting but simply handing in the output will earn you 0 points. Treat all parts you have not modified as quotations: Write the name and version of any GenAI you used and the prompts you fed them. Other: Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. More than four absences means you will fail the class. And it is not enough for you to be present, you are also expected to participate actively.この授業は成績評価欄に記載の項目によって、目標（到達目標欄に記載）の到達度を測ります。
備考Note0:
Bring your own devise for every class.
Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. Be on time for class, and be prepared.  Arrival in class after 15 minutes after class has started = absent. If you are absent more than 4 times without a proper and accepted reason, you have disqualified yourself in this class. Copy-paste is illegal, and if I find you do it, you fail the class.

name: 【200】英語IIＢ（SW）　１／English II B(Speaking & Writing)
担当者: ヘアマンセン　Ｃ．（HERMANSEN CHRISTIAN MORIMOTO）
成績評価備考:
備考　Note
Individual reports: Throughout the course, you will get assignments - written and oral reports. All of them count toward the final grade. Content quality accounts for 60 percent, while language accuracy and other formal qualities comprise 40 percent.
NB: COPY-PASTE IS ILLEGAL. 

Using AI-assistance is tempting but simply handing in the output will earn you 0 points. Treat all parts you have not modified as quotations: Write the name and version of any GenAI you used and the prompts you fed them. 

Other: Attendance is mandatory in accordance with the rules of the School of Law and Politics. More than four absences means you will fail the class. And it is not enough for you to be present, you are also expected to participate actively.
